title: Advertisement of Job Vacancies with Approved Crew Orders. LMAs
content: 60 may advertise job vacancies of accredited principal/employer without prior approval from 61 24 the Department and within the validity of its accreditation. The advertisement shall 1 indicate the following information: 2 a. Name, address and DMW license number of the agency; 3 4 b. Type of ship; 5 6 c. Rank or Position; and 7 8 d. Number of available positions. 9 10 Further, individuals, agents, representatives or vloggers utilized for the purpose of 11 advertising job openings on behalf of licensed manning agencies must be duly authorized 12 by the LMA and duly acknowledged by the Department, subject to additional guidelines 13 as it may prescribe. 14 15
